rows.label: qev050402_MSG0001
rows.name:
...He's late! What on earth is that boy doing?!
Surely he didn't tuck his tail and run
at the very last moment![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050402_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hmm...?
Who might you be?
Do you have some business with me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050402_SEL0011
rows.name:
Announce that you have come to accept the duel
as De Ezich's proxy.

rows.label: qev050402_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask him what he is doing in a place like this.

rows.label: qev050402_MSG0003
rows.name:
...What?!
Are you saying that boy isn't coming to the duel...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050402_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's not something I should be sharing with a stranger, but...
Well, there is a man whose character
I need to beat into shape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050402_MSG0005
rows.name:
I challenged him to a duel and have been waiting here.
Consequently, this area will soon become a battlefield.
You had best leave quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050402_MSG0006
rows.name:
...What?!
You were asked to act as a proxy... for the duel?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050402_MSG0007
rows.name:
Guh... Not only does this violate Larsian law,
but to think he was rotten enough as a man to do such a thing!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050402_MSG0008
rows.name:
I can no longer tolerate this!!
First, I will defeat you...
And then, I will strike that boy down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050402_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yes! That is the responsibility of the father
who brought that man into this world!
I pity you, an innocent, but I must ask you to disappear![ST:wait ]
